vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #567. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief --rollback does not revert .gitignore append (residual dirty tree)

narratives.Overview: `task migrate:vbrief -- --rollback` does not reverse the forward pass's `.gitignore` append, leaving ` M .gitignore` in the working tree after a rollback that claims success. Root cause: safety-manifest.json has no file_modifications[] array, so the in-place `.gitignore` edit is not recorded and not reversible. Fix: extend safety-manifest.json with file_modifications[] (path/operation/pre_hash/post_hash/appended_content), have rollback restore per-entry when pre/post hashes match, refuse when neither matches (operator edited since migration). Add a cross-platform regression test: migrate -> rollback -> assert git status --porcelain is empty. See GitHub issue #567 for full root cause, suggested fix, and acceptance criteria.

references.title: Issue #567: migrate:vbrief --rollback does not revert .gitignore append (residual dirty tree)
